interaction_phrase: Professor Winfried Hensinger and Dr Sebastian Weidt have recently launched [their spin-out
occurrence_sentence: Professor Winfried Hensinger and Dr Sebastian Weidt have recently launched [their spin-out company Universal Quantum](https://www.sussex.ac.uk/news/all?id=52234) which aims to build the world's first large scale quantum computer.
